content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于5月9日18:20(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 

【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50

【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月23日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了「相位对弈」对战中退出后，在对战结束前重新登录无法进入游戏的问题。

V2.5.0.7 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on May 9 at 18:20(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!

[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50

[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 23, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.

[Bug Fix]

● Fixed an issue where, after exiting a "Traphase" match, logging back in before the match ended would prevent players from re-entering the game.
抱歉給守密人帶來不好的體驗，校務處正在全力排查修復此問題🙇‍♂️ <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
